---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or non-trivial change
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
<!-- What user-facing problem does this solve? Be specific. "Nice-to-have" with
no concrete user pain rarely lands. -->

## Proposed approach
<!-- High-level sketch. We're more likely to accept if you've thought through
the scope + integration points. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What else could solve this? Why is your approach best? -->

## Out of scope (good fences)
- [ ] This issue does NOT include: <list>

## Scope check
Is this on the current milestone? See `memory/todo.md` for what's
explicitly deferred / out-of-scope / gated. If it's GATED on hardware /
credentials / a not-yet-shipped subsystem, please say so up front.

## Willing to implement?
- [ ] Yes, with maintainer guidance.
- [ ] Yes, but I'd appreciate a design review first.
- [ ] No, just suggesting; happy if someone else picks it up.
